content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(exp_lt_no_skew)
C: exp_lt_no_skew ∧ skew30_fix
H: exp_lt_no_skew → refresh_loop
P: bc(reg_t) ∧ sec(keep_401)
V: edge(-30s_201) ∧ edge(-31s_401)
R: !skew30
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(exp < now without grace window).
Constraints: exp < now without grace window and 30-second grace window fix.
Hypothesis: exp < now without grace window then refresh_loop.
Plan: backward compatibility(regression test) and security(keep 401 behavior).
Verify: edge(-30s_201) and edge(-31s_401).
Risk: high-risk 30-second grace window.
Answer target: regression test.
